issues.description: Second effect missing condition: requires 'TrashCount' >= 10. Currently has no condition check.
Action type is 'KO' but effect text says 'give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3 cost during this turn'. Should be 'PowerBoost' with negative value, not KO.
Trigger is 'Trigger' (generic) but should be linked to the same OnPlay trigger as the draw. Should follow DrawCard action within same effect chain or use conditional trigger.
Missing duration constraint. Text states 'during this turn' → duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (cost reduction applies when opponent tries to play/use the Character).
